title: annotator outputs are isolated under their configured names
manifest_yaml:
agent_control_specification_version: 0.3.1-beta
policies:
  p:
    type: rego
    query: data.acs.verdict
intervention_points:
  input:
    policy:
      id: p
    policy_target: $snap.input
    annotations:
      beta:
        from: $policy_target.text
      alpha:
        from: $policy_target.text
annotators:
  alpha:
    type: classifier
  beta:
    type: classifier
